seo.title: PDF upload preparation - Prepare PDFs for size limits
seo.description: Prepare a PDF against a target size in your browser, then review readability, page count, and download status for applications or forms.

lead: Choose a PDF and target size, then try to create an upload-ready result in your browser.

strings.heroLead: Designed for exam, visa, application, and form upload workflows. The tool processes files in the browser and reminds you to review the result.
strings.mobileNotice: Mobile devices have limited memory; use a desktop browser for important files.
strings.dropLead: Drop a PDF here, or choose a local file with the button.
strings.analysisTip: Local analysis hints appear after you choose a PDF.
strings.readyHint: Choose a PDF to start. The file and target are locked during processing.
strings.processingSummary: Keep this page open. The original file is not modified.
strings.resultCopy: Preview the result and confirm readability before downloading for submission.
strings.readabilityLabel: I checked readability, page count, and orientation
